subcodes.first_line: Say: O Party of God and diverse parties of the world! Arise ye to render assistance and create a realm of love and fellowship [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: بگو یا حزب الله و احزاب مختلفه عالم بر نصرت قیام نمائید و عالم محبت و وداد
subcodes.subjects: @true liberty; freedom, @unity; oneness of humanity, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @serving humanity; working for progress, betterment of the world, @call to action
